The '''Battle of [[Altair 9]]''' was a battle fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] sometime between the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] and the [[Mission to Ord Cestus]]. [[Jangotat|Alpha-98]] was wounded in the battle.

{{Battle-stub}}
